data.description:
## What
Enrich the api-compat overlay prompt with dso content: recall patterns AND FP-guards (both halves), per the
locked principle that domain rubric lives in the overlay, not the generic Pass-2 verifier. Recall: asymmetric interface change, producer/consumer drift, wire/CLI/config backward-compat breaks; grep consumers of changed public surface.

## Files
- src/rebar/llm/reviewers/code-review-api-compat.md
- eval spec + fixtures for the api-compat overlay (recall + no-fire cases)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] api-compat overlay carries both recall patterns and FP-discrimination guards.
- [ ] Lands with a passing recall + no-fire eval; does not over-suppress valid patterns.
- [ ] Overlay remains advisory; no domain rubric leaks into code-review-verify.md.
data.title: api-compat overlay enrichment
